name: SYS 00 — HubSpot Events Router
description: Receives batched HubSpot webhook events at /hubspot-events, parses dealstage and contact changes, fetches full deal or contact from HubSpot API, then forwards to the correct system webhook so SYS 04 — Client Onboarding Logistics, SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery, SYS 03 — Contract Generation, SYS 03 — Invoice and Payment Collection, SYS 07 — Internal Reporting Dashboard, SYS 05 — Referral and Reactivation Engine, and related paths run on deal closed-won, proposal, contract sent, invoice, project-complete, and contact changes.

parameters.content:
## SYS 00 — HubSpot Events Router

**Trigger:** Webhook POST at `/hubspot-events` (single HubSpot app target URL).

**What it does:** Receives batched HubSpot webhook events, parses event type and dealstage/contact changes, fetches full deal or contact from HubSpot API, then POSTs to the correct system webhook path so downstream workflows run unchanged — e.g. **SYS 04 — Client Onboarding Logistics** (closed-won), **SYS 03 — Proposal and Contract Delivery** (proposal), **SYS 03 — Contract Generation** (contract sent via direct webhook or HubSpot automation), **SYS 03 — Invoice and Payment Collection** (invoice sent), **SYS 07 — Internal Reporting Dashboard** (stage/contact changes), **SYS 05 — Referral and Reactivation Engine** (project complete).

**HubSpot app Target URL:** `https://n8n.intrawebtech.com/webhook/hubspot-events`

**Subscriptions to create in HubSpot:**
- `deal.propertyChange` → property **dealstage** (for closed-won, proposal, invoice, project-complete, and reporting)
- `contact.propertyChange` → properties as needed for **SYS 07 — Internal Reporting Dashboard** (e.g. lifecyclestage, or create multiple)

**Dependencies:** CONFIG (**hubspot.dealStageIds** — internal stage IDs from your portal; if Proposal fires SYS 07 instead of SYS 03, your proposal ID does not match), HubSpot API credential.
